overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city environment under a massive highway overpass. The player character walks past a restaurant with outdoor seating, turns toward a waterfront canal with industrial buildings in the distance, then loops back toward the urban plaza. The scene features neon signage, steam vents, and a mix of sheltered and open areas with a moody, overcast atmosphere typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with outdoor dining

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass past a restaurant with green outdoor umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt and shorts walking toward the camera

illuminated advertising screens and neon signs attached to the overpass ceiling

thick structural support columns for the overpass
low green hedge bushes separating the walkway from the restaurant seating

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic urban setting. The camera moves forward past a restaurant with distinctive green and yellow exterior walls and outdoor seating with green umbrellas. Neon billboards illuminate the ceiling of the overpass. A pedestrian in a teal shirt walks past on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlook with industrial district views

events.description: exits the covered overpass area and turns right toward the open waterfront

agents.ego_description: turning right toward the waterfront railing and walking along the promenade edge

entered.detail: metal safety railing with horizontal bars along the edge of the water
dark water canal reflecting the city lights with gentle ripples
large industrial buildings with tall smokestacks emitting white steam
large concrete planter with tall palm trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered walkway to an open waterfront promenade. The camera turns right, revealing a canal with dark water and a metal safety railing. Across the water, an industrial complex with tall smokestacks emitting steam becomes visible. The highway overpass structure remains visible on the left side but is now open to the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway with panoramic city skyline views

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing observing the industrial district and skyline across the canal

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers forming the distant city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the waterfront promenade, offering an unobstructed view of the canal and the industrial district on the opposite bank. Tall skyscrapers rise in the distant background against the overcast dusk sky. Palm trees in concrete planters line the walkway as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under overpass near industrial complex with steam vents

events.description: turns away from the waterfront and re-enters the covered area under the overpass
industrial smokestacks with heavy steam emissions become prominent in the near background

agents.ego_description: walking through the urban plaza under the overpass toward the industrial area, passing multiple pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking across the plaza away from the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera

entered.detail: the same green and yellow restaurant building now approached from the front/side angle
green patio umbrellas visible again from the opposite direction
industrial steam vents emitting white smoke near the factory buildings
tall modern street lamps with orange glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the waterfront and walks back under the overpass into a more populated urban plaza. The industrial complex with prominent smokestacks emitting steam dominates the background. The camera approaches the restaurant building again from a different angle, passing pedestrians crossing the plaza. The atmosphere shifts from open waterfront back to the sheltered, neon-lit environment under the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered urban underpass to an open industrial waterfront before looping back into the neon-lit city plaza. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, gliding past a restaurant with green and yellow walls and outdoor umbrellas while neon billboards illuminate the ceiling. As the camera turns right, the scene opens from the covered walkway onto a waterfront promenade, revealing a dark canal and a distant industrial complex with steaming smokestacks under an overcast dusk sky. The view expands along the promenade past palm trees in concrete planters and distant skyscrapers before the camera turns away from the water. Finally, the movement leads back under the overpass and into a populated plaza, shifting the atmosphere from the open air back to the sheltered, neon-lit environment as the restaurant reappears from a new angle.
